fault_hypothesis: The code on line 75 incorrectly removes an element from the merged list if the last elements of both input lists are identical. This violates the postcondition that the merged list must contain all elements from both inputs.

constraints.intent: The statement on line 75, which removes an element, should never be executed.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition to remove a shared trailing element should not be met, as all elements must be preserved.
Before the final capping step, the merged list must contain the sum of elements from both inputs.
